hero.title: Services
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to launch and grow your online presence.

pageIntro: We're a web studio. Most clients start with a new or redesigned website or a custom web app. We also offer brand design and CRM & automation when that's what you need.

problemStatement.heading: Sound familiar?
lines: Your website doesn't reflect how good your business is.
Visitors don't turn into leads or sales.
You're not sure what to fix first.
problemStatement.bridge: We fix that—with strategy, design, and build.

services.title: Websites
services.description: Fast, responsive websites that turn visitors into customers. Built for performance and conversion.

services.title: Local SEO
services.description: Get found on Google by local customers. We set up and manage your Google Business Profile, local keywords, and monthly reports. Done-for-you—add after your website launches.
whatsIncluded: No ranking guarantees—we focus on visibility

services.title: Custom Software
services.description: Tailored software solutions that solve your specific business challenges. From web applications to internal tools, we build what you need.

services.title: Brand Design
services.description: Stand out from the crowd with a cohesive brand identity that resonates with your audience.

services.title: CRM & Automation
services.description: Streamline your operations with CRM setup and workflow automation that saves time and increases efficiency.

afterLaunch.heading: After launch
afterLaunch.body: We build your website, then help local customers find it.

steps.title: Local SEO
steps.description: Get found on Google. Add when you're ready.

steps.title: Automation
steps.description: Handle leads and follow-up without the manual work.

processTeaser.heading: How it works
processTeaser.body: We align on scope and timeline, then design and build in clear phases. Most projects launch in 4–8 weeks.

benefits.title: Fast delivery
benefits.description: Most projects launch in 4-8 weeks. No endless revisions or scope creep—just results.

benefits.title: Conversion-focused
benefits.description: Every design decision is backed by data. We build to convert visitors into customers.

benefits.title: Ongoing support
benefits.description: We're here after launch. Updates, maintenance, and improvements—we've got you covered.
